pageContext.name: Batman Batcave (Black Version)
pageContext.description: 'Criminals, by nature, are a cowardly and superstitious lot. To instill fear into their hearts, I became a bat. A monster in the night.   Sideshow and Prime 1 Studio are pleased to announce the latest development in our Premium Bust Series: The Batman Batcave (Black Version) Bust from Batman: Hush!  Prime 1 Studio has heard the clamor of our dedicated fans and has worked tirelessly to release a Black and Gray version of the previous Batman: Hush Premium Bust. As any diehard Batman fans know, Batman is often portrayed as either wearing Blue and Gray or Black and Gray. This makes for a genuinely flexible product offering for the Caped Crusader!   This 8-inch-tall Black Version Premium Bust has all the crisp detail and picture-perfect paint of the previous version! Add to your DC Comics collection today!
